name: Zumtobel Group AG Inhaber-Aktie
summary: Zumtobel Group AG Inhaber-Aktie is an international lighting group that develops, produces, and distributes luminaires, lighting management systems, and lighting components for indoor and outdoor applications. The company offers lighting solutions for various sectors, including offices, retail, industry, and healthcare. Zumtobel Group is headquartered in Dornbirn, Austria.
